name: Baidu · SerpApi

env_keys.comment: Same SerpApi key for all engines; anysearch uses `engine="baidu"`.

python_extra.comment: pip extra `serpapi`; call with `provider="serpapi"`, `engine="baidu"`.

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: Organic results via SerpApi `engine=baidu`.

language.comment: Language filter via Baidu-specific params (`ct`, etc.).

answer.comment: Answer box when the engine JSON includes one (not explicitly requested).

mode.comment: Fixed SerpApi backend `engine=baidu` (set via anysearch `engine="baidu"` with `provider="serpapi"`). No separate fast/deep tier on this engine.

pricing_per_1k.comment: Monthly plan price divided by included searches; applies to all SerpApi engine rows.

notes: SerpApi proxy to Baidu (`engine=baidu`). Native SDK package: google-search-results.

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: Organic results via SerpApi `engine=bing`.

answer.comment: Answer box when the engine JSON includes one (not explicitly requested).

mode.comment: Fixed SerpApi backend `engine=bing` (set via anysearch `engine="bing"` with `provider="serpapi"`). No separate fast/deep tier on this engine.

name: Brave

env_keys.comment: API keys and configuration variables documented by the provider.

python_extra.comment: HTTP API only; no required vendor Python SDK.

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: Web/news SERP snippets. Answers API has no ranked snippet list — use web search or citations.

country.comment: `country` on web/news SERP. Answers API does not expose the same filters.

language.comment: `search_lang` and `ui_lang` on web search. Not on Answers chat completions.

date.comment: Web/news `freshness` presets (`pd`, `pw`, `pm`, `py`) or custom range. Answers: none.

answer.comment: Answers API: OpenAI-compatible grounded completion with citations. Web search returns SERP JSON only (no LLM answer field).

content.comment: Answers API embeds cited source URLs in the completion. Web search has snippets, not full pages.

highlights.comment: `extra_snippets=true` — up to 5 alternate excerpts per web result (Pro).

mode.comment: **Web/news SERP** (`/res/v1/web/search`) → matrix `balanced`. **Answers API** (`POST /res/v1/chat/completions`, `model=brave`) → balanced (single-pass grounded answer); `enable_research=true` (streaming)→deep. Same `BRAVE_API_KEY`.

pricing_per_1k.comment: Search API pricing depends on Base AI vs Pro AI plan; Answers adds token charges.

notes: Web/news Search API is in the anysearch SDK; Answers API (`/res/v1/chat/completions`) is documented in the matrix but not wired in the SDK yet.

name: DuckDuckGo

env_keys.comment: API keys and configuration variables documented by the provider.

python_extra.comment: Optional PyPI package: ddgs (install via anysearch-sdk extra `duckduckgo`).

requires_key.comment: No API key required.

snippet.comment: Short description field returned with each result.

answer.comment: AI answer

mode.comment: Keyless DDGS client: instant web results without a depth parameter. Matrix `balanced` = default `text()` search.

pricing_per_1k.value: $0 API fee via keyless DDGS client; unofficial/fragile
pricing_per_1k.comment: No paid official web search API is used by anysearch's keyless fallback.

notes: No API key required (keyless fallback). Native SDK package: ddgs.

name: DuckDuckGo · SerpApi

python_extra.comment: pip extra `serpapi`; call with `provider="serpapi"`, `engine="duckduckgo"`.

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: Organic results via SerpApi `engine=duckduckgo`.

country.comment: `kl` region tag (e.g. us-en) combines country + language.

answer.comment: Answer box when the engine JSON includes one (not explicitly requested).

mode.comment: Fixed SerpApi backend `engine=duckduckgo` (set via anysearch `engine="duckduckgo"` with `provider="serpapi"`). No separate fast/deep tier on this engine.

pricing_per_1k.comment: Monthly plan price divided by included searches; applies to all SerpApi engine rows.

notes: SerpApi proxy to DuckDuckGo (`engine=duckduckgo`). Native SDK package: google-search-results.

env_keys.comment: API keys and configuration variables documented by the provider.

python_extra.comment: Optional PyPI package: exa-py (install via anysearch-sdk extra `exa`).

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: Short description field returned with each result.

answer.comment: AI answer

summary.comment: `contents.summary` returns an AI summary per result.

highlights.comment: `contents.highlights` — query-relevant excerpts (~10× fewer tokens than full text).

news.comment: `category: news` or `type` tuned for news-style retrieval.

mode.comment: POST /search `type`: `instant`/`fast` (latency), `auto` (balanced), `deep` / `deep-lite` / `deep-reasoning` (agentic multi-source synthesis; optional `output_schema`). anysearch: fast→fast, balanced→auto, deep→deep.

pricing_per_1k.comment: Per 1K requests with up to 10 results; summaries and additional results are billed separately.

env_keys.comment: API keys and configuration variables documented by the provider.

python_extra.comment: Optional PyPI package: firecrawl-py (install via anysearch-sdk extra `firecrawl`).

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: Short description field returned with each result.

answer.comment: AI answer

content.comment: `scrapeOptions.formats` (e.g. `markdown`) embeds full page text per hit.

mode.comment: Single search tier (title, URL, description). `scrapeOptions` fetches page bodies but is not an AI synthesis `mode`.

pricing_per_1k.comment: Convert credits to dollars from your Firecrawl plan; search without scrape costs one credit.

env_keys.comment: API keys and configuration variables documented by the provider.

python_extra.comment: Optional PyPI package: google-genai (install via anysearch-sdk extra `gemini`).

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: `groundingMetadata.groundingChunks[]` — each `web.uri` / `web.title` becomes a result row.

answer.comment: Grounded model text in `candidates[0].content.parts`; request with `answer=true` to populate SearchResponse.answer.

mode.comment: `generateContent` with `tools: [{google_search: {}}]` — model decides when to search and returns synthesized text plus `groundingMetadata` sources (use `answer=true` in anysearch). Default model `gemini-2.5-flash` via `provider_config.gemini.model`.

pricing_per_1k.comment: Grounding with Google Search is billed per 1K grounded requests plus Gemini model token charges.

env_keys.comment: API keys and configuration variables documented by the provider.

python_extra.comment: HTTP API only; no required vendor Python SDK.

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: Short description field returned with each result.

date.comment: `sort=date:r:YYYYMMDD:YYYYMMDD` when both range ends are set.

answer.comment: AI answer

mode.comment: Custom Search JSON API: no search-depth or speed preset—only `num`, `sort`, and `siteSearch` filters. Matrix `balanced` = default `cse.list` behavior.

pricing_per_1k.comment: Custom Search JSON API and Programmable Search Element paid API are listed at $5/1K queries.

answer.comment: Answer box when the engine JSON includes one (not explicitly requested).

pricing_per_1k.comment: Monthly plan price divided by included searches; applies to all SerpApi engine rows.

notes: SerpApi proxy to Google (`engine=google`). Native SDK package: google-search-results.

env_keys.comment: API keys and configuration variables documented by the provider.

python_extra.comment: HTTP API only; no required vendor Python SDK.

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: Short description field returned with each result.

answer.comment: AI answer

content.comment: Search returns markdown page bodies unless `X-Respond-With: no-content` is set.

mode.comment: Reader Search has no vendor fast/synthesis mode knob. Default returns SERP + optional page markdown; `X-Respond-With: no-content` is a fetch shortcut, not a latency tier.

pricing_per_1k.comment: Reader/Search usage is priced by tokens/usage tiers rather than a fixed per-1K query price.

env_keys.comment: API keys and configuration variables documented by the provider.

python_extra.comment: HTTP API only; no required vendor Python SDK.

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: Each result includes a `snippet`; length follows account Search settings.

answer.comment: AI answer

mode.comment: No request `mode`; snippet length comes from account Settings → Search.

pricing_per_1k.value: not publicly itemized per 1K for Search API
pricing_per_1k.comment: Kagi documents pay-per-use API portal billing but not a stable public Search API CPM in docs.

name: Keiro

env_keys.comment: API keys and configuration variables documented by the provider.

python_extra.comment: Optional PyPI package: keirolabs (install via anysearch-sdk extra `keiro`).

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: `results[]` include title, URL, snippet, score, and optional published date.

answer.comment: AI answer

content.comment: `/api/v2/search/content` returns full page markdown (`full_text`) and optional chunks.

mode.comment: v2 Search `mode`: `light`→fast, `ai`→balanced, `deep`→deep. anysearch uses `/api/v2/search/flash` for fast mode, `/api/v2/keiro` by default, and `/api/v2/search/content` for full-text content.

pricing_per_1k.comment: Keiro docs list credit costs per v2 endpoint and headline cost per 1,000 searches.

notes: Native SDK package: keirolabs. SDK maps default v2 search to `/api/v2/keiro`, `mode=fast` to `/api/v2/search/flash`, and `include_content=true` to `/api/v2/search/content`.

env_keys.comment: API keys and configuration variables documented by the provider.

python_extra.comment: Optional PyPI package: linkup-sdk (install via anysearch-sdk extra `linkup`).

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: Short description field returned with each result.

answer.comment: `outputType`: `sourcedAnswer` returns a cited natural-language answer.

content.comment: `outputType`: `searchResults` with page content in standard/deep depths.

mode.comment: Native `depth`: `fast`, `standard` (balanced), or `deep` (multi-iteration agentic search-and-scrape). Cited synthesis uses `outputType=sourcedAnswer` (`answer=true` in anysearch), including at `deep` depth. anysearch: fast/balanced/deep→matching depth.

pricing_per_1k.comment: Fast and standard cost one credit/call; deep costs ten credits/call. Fast docs list €0.005/call.

name: Parallel

env_keys.comment: API keys and configuration variables documented by the provider.

python_extra.comment: Optional PyPI package: parallel-web (install via anysearch-sdk extra `parallel`).

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: Search API ranked result excerpts. Task API is not a snippet SERP — structured task output.

domains.comment: Search API: `advanced_settings.source_policy` domain allow/deny. Task API has no domain filter knob.

country.comment: Search API `advanced_settings.location` (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). Not on Task API.

date.comment: Search API `source_policy.after_date` for freshness. Task API has no date filter.

answer.comment: Task API synthesized output plus `basis` (citations, reasoning, confidence). Search API returns ranked excerpts only.

content.comment: Search API: pre-compressed excerpts (`excerpt_settings` optional). Task API: text/JSON/markdown via `task_spec.output_schema`.

highlights.comment: Ranked excerpts per URL are the default Search API payload (not Task API).

mode.comment: **Search API** `mode`: `basic`→fast, `advanced`→balanced (richer retrieval, not synthesis). **Task API** (`POST /v1/tasks/runs`) `processor`: Lite/Base→fast, Core→balanced, Pro/Ultra→deep (structured output with citations). Same `PARALLEL_API_KEY`.

pricing_per_1k.comment: Search API is $5/1K requests; Task processors map roughly from Base/Core to Pro/Ultra for deeper modes.

notes: Native SDK package: parallel-web. Search API is in the anysearch SDK; Task API (`POST /v1/tasks/runs`) is documented in the matrix but not wired in the SDK yet.

name: Perplexity

env_keys.comment: API keys and configuration variables documented by the provider.

python_extra.comment: Optional PyPI package: perplexityai (install via anysearch-sdk extra `perplexity`).

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: Search API `results[].snippet`. Sonar has no ranked snippet list — use Search API or citations.

domains.comment: `search_domain_filter` on Search API and Sonar (allowlist or `-domain` denylist).

country.comment: Search API has no `gl` country param; Sonar supports regional bias via search options.

language.comment: `search_language_filter` on Search API (ISO 639-1). Not exposed on Sonar chat requests.

answer.comment: Sonar assistant message — synthesized prose with citations (`/chat/completions`). Search API returns raw `results[]` only (no LLM answer field).

content.comment: Search API: larger `snippet` via `snippet_mode`, `max_tokens`, `max_tokens_per_page`. Sonar does not return full page bodies.

mode.comment: **Search API** (`POST /search`) → matrix `balanced`: raw ranked `results[]` (anysearch SDK). **Sonar** (`POST /chat/completions`) → model `sonar`→balanced (grounded answer + citations), `sonar-pro`→deep (multi-source research synthesis). Same `PERPLEXITY_API_KEY`.

pricing_per_1k.value: search: $5; fast/sonar low: $5; balanced: $8-$10; deep/high/pro: $12-$22 + tokens
pricing_per_1k.comment: Search API is request-only; Sonar tiers add token charges and request fees by context size/search type.

notes: Native SDK package: perplexityai. Search API (`POST /search`) is in the anysearch SDK; Sonar (`POST /chat/completions`) is documented in the matrix but not wired in the SDK yet.

env_keys.comment: API keys and configuration variables documented by the provider.

python_extra.comment: HTTP API only; no required vendor Python SDK.

requires_key.comment: No API key required.

snippet.comment: Short description field returned with each result.

answer.comment: Instant answers in the `answers` array when engines provide them.

mode.comment: Meta-search JSON API: result richness depends on configured engines, not a global depth flag. Matrix `balanced` = default instance search.

pricing_per_1k.value: $0 API fee if self-hosted; infra/proxy costs separate
pricing_per_1k.comment: Open-source self-hosted metasearch; operating costs depend on deployment.

env_keys.comment: API keys and configuration variables documented by the provider.

python_extra.comment: HTTP API only; no required vendor Python SDK.

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: Short description field returned with each result.

answer.comment: Featured snippets / answer box when returned by the engine.

news.comment: Use the Google News engine for news results.

mode.comment: Google engine wrapper: single SERP depth per request (no native fast/deep tier).

pricing_per_1k.comment: Pricing is plan/volume based; verify current SearchApi.io plan before budgeting.

env_keys.comment: API keys and configuration variables documented by the provider.

python_extra.comment: HTTP API only; no required vendor Python SDK.

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: Short description field returned with each result.

answer.comment: Answer box / knowledge graph surfaced in JSON when Google returns them.

mode.comment: Google SERP proxy: one ranked result style per call (no fast/deep API knob). Matrix `balanced` = standard /search or /news endpoint.

pricing_per_1k.comment: Top-up credit pricing; exact per-1K rate decreases with larger credit packs.

name: Tavily

env_keys.comment: API keys and configuration variables documented by the provider.

python_extra.comment: Optional PyPI package: tavily-python (install via anysearch-sdk extra `tavily`).

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: Search API ranked result snippets. Research API returns a report only — no SERP list.

domains.comment: Search API: `include_domains` / `exclude_domains` (max 300). Research API has no domain filter.

country.comment: Search API `country` (topic `general` only). Not on Research API.

date.comment: Search API `start_date` / `end_date` or `time_range`. Research API has no date filter.

answer.comment: Search: `include_answer` (`basic`/`advanced`) short LLM blurb from results. Research: completed task `content` is a full cited research report.

content.comment: Search: `include_raw_content` per result. Research: `sources[]` URLs + optional `output_schema`.

news.comment: Search API `topic`: `news`. Research API has no news topic.

mode.comment: **Search API** `search_depth`: `ultra-fast`/`fast`→fast, `basic`→balanced (`include_answer` is a short blurb, not deep research). **Research API** (`POST /research`) `model`: `mini`/`auto`→balanced, `pro`→deep (multi-agent cited report). Same `TAVILY_API_KEY`.

pricing_per_1k.comment: Uses API credits; pay-as-you-go credits are listed at $0.008/credit, with higher-depth calls consuming more credits.

notes: Native SDK package: tavily-python. Search API is in the anysearch SDK; Research API (`POST /research`) is documented in the matrix (use `tavily-python` `research()` / `get_research()`).

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: Organic results via SerpApi `engine=yandex`.

language.comment: Language via Yandex-specific params (see SerpApi docs).

answer.comment: Answer box when the engine JSON includes one (not explicitly requested).

name: You

env_keys.comment: API keys and configuration variables documented by the provider.

python_extra.comment: HTTP API only; no required vendor Python SDK.

requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

snippet.comment: Search: ranked web results with snippets. Research: source excerpts in `output.sources[]`.

date.comment: Research API `source_control.freshness` only. Search API has no date-range filter.

answer.comment: Research `output.content` — Markdown with citations. Search returns ranked snippets only.

content.comment: Research sources include URL, title, and excerpt text. Search has no full-page body field.

highlights.comment: Search API: multiple `snippets` strings per web result. Not on Research API.

mode.comment: **Search API** (`POST /v1/search`) → matrix `balanced` (ranked snippets, SDK). **Research API** (`POST /v1/research`) → `research_effort`: `lite`→fast, `standard`→balanced, `deep` / `exhaustive`→deep (cited synthesis). Same `YDC_API_KEY`.

pricing_per_1k.value: search: $5; research lite: $12; deeper research: tier dependent
pricing_per_1k.comment: Search API is $5/1K calls; Research API starts at $12/1K and increases by effort tier.

notes: Search API (`POST /v1/search`) is in the anysearch SDK; Research API (`POST /v1/research`) is documented in the matrix but not wired in the SDK yet.
